titleStmt.title: SII 26.661: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 661. (A.R. No. 620 of 1909.) TIRUCHCHIRAI, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Kulōttuṅgachōḷadēva I: Year 47 = 1116-17 A.D., The details of date Ishabha (Vaikāśi) ba. 10, Wednesday, Sadaiyam are irregular.

summary.p: This inscription records that the assembly of Śrīvāṉavanmādēvich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a Brahmadēyam in Śēṟṟūṟ-kūṟṟam in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu met in the temple of the god Tirunārāyaṇaviṇṇagarāḻvār of the same place, and decided to sell away certain lands belonging to them as well as to some other people who had not paid the dues on it, on the orders of the king. Accordingly the assembly sold to the temple of the god Tiruchchenneri-uḍaiyār of Śrīrājasundarich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam of the same nāḍu, for a sum of 51 kāśu.

Among the boundaries of the sold land are mentioned lands belonging to the temple of Tiruchchittirakūṭattāḻvār, and to the temple of Tiruppaṉaṅkāḍuḍaiya-mahādēvar and also the place Kulōttuṅgaśōḻanallūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 7 Āvatu Iṣabhanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu daśamiyum putankiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cataiyatti nāḷ kulottu
ṅkacoḻavaḷanāṭṭuc ceṟṟūṟ kūṟṟattu brahmadeyam śrīvāṉavanmāteviccatu rvvedimaṅkalattup paṭṭapperumakkaḷuḷḷiṭṭa mahāsabhaiyom Ivvūṟ tirunārāyaṇa
viṇṇakarāḻvār koyilile kūṭṭaṅ kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu Eṅkaḷukku Iṟaikaṭitāyuṭaṉuḷḷatu nerākak kuṭuttu Eṅkaḷāṟ teṭiyiṟukkalāvatu miṟuttu pinpiṟuk
ka vuṭalillāmaiyiṉum Innāḷil kuṭimakkaḷāy nilaniṉṟu kaṭamaiyiṟātār nilaṅkaḷ koḷvāṟku viṟṟukkācoṭukkukavenṟu prasātañ ceytaruḷiṉa tirumukam vantamai
yil munninṟu kaṭamaiyiṟātoṭippoṉa māṭilan śrīkraṣṇapaṭṭaṉum kavuṇiyaṉ taṇṇāyār nampipaṭṭaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭāratum munpe sabhaip potuvāyk kiṭanta nilamumāka
innāṭṭu brahmadeyam śrīrājasun=tariccaturvvetimaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tiruccenneṟiyuṭaiyāṟku viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivvūr nālāṅkaṇṭattu Innilattukkuk
kiḻpārkkellai Ivvūr tiruccittirakūṭattāḻvārutāṉa Iṟaiyili nilattukkum sabhaip potuvāṉa nilattukku śrīkriṣṇapaṭṭaṉ nilattukkum paṭṭaippiṭāri koyili
ninṟum vaṭakku nokkippoṉa voḻukkaikku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai kkum tiruppaṉaṅkāṭuṭaiya mahādevariṟaiyili nilattukku vaṭakkum melpār
kkellai maḻavacerivāykkālukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai kulottuṅkacoḻanallūrukku nirpāyakkalliṉ vāykkālukkut teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta perunānkellaiyu
ḷ naṭuvupaṭṭu Eṅkaḷukku somamāyirunta nilam Oṉṟe kāṇiyaraikkāṇiyum Innāyaṉār tirunāmatte viṟṟukkuṭuttu Iṉṉāyaṉār koyilil śrīmā- hesvarak kaṇkāṇi vitivi
ṭaṅkaṉ karuvuṇāyakaṉ piḷḷaiyaṭiyārum tevakanmikaḷum kaivaḻi kuṭivilaiyāka sammatittukkoṇṭa Anṟāṭu naṟkācu 5 Ikkācu Añcum Āvaṇakkaḷiye kāṭṭeṟṟi kaic
celavaṟakkoṇṭu Innilam viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom Ittirucceṟiyuṭaiyāṟku Innālūrāṉa vāṉavanmāteviccaturvvetimaṅkalattuppaṭṭap
perumakkaḷuḷḷiṭṭa mahāsabhaiyom Innilam Onṟe kāṇiyaraikkāṇikkum nāṅkaḷ Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttu Innāyaṉār tevakanmikaḷ kaivaḻi kaikkoṇṭa kācu
5 10 1 Ikkācu Aimpattoṉṟuṅ kāṭṭeṟṟik kaiccelavaṟakkoṇṭu Ittiruccenneṟiyuṭaiya mahādevaṟku candrādittavaṟ śāśvatikamāka Innilam Oṉṟe kāṇiyaraikkā
ṇiyum Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttu Ikkācu Aimpattonṟuṅ koṇṭom Ivvūr nampip perumāḷuḷḷiṭṭa mahāsabhaiyom
Digital edition of SII 26.661 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
